title: Neviti Rocking Rudolf Card Peg Kit, Multi-Colour, 20-Piece
features: Each pack contains 20 pegs and 5m of satin ribbon
They can be co-ordinated with the full ‘Rocking Rudolf’ range or used alone
description: Our adorable Christmas card holder kit features our friendly reindeer character and contains 20 wooden pegs and 5 m of white ribbon. Use our kit to make a real feature of your Christmas cards by attaching ribbon to door backs, around a mantelpiece and other areas of your home. Made from high quality materials you can use again and again, this kit makes a lovely addition to your Christmas décor.
